name: ECS Comprehensive Benchmark
description: Directly references the upstream spiritLHLS/ecs Shell ECS/VPS comprehensive benchmark script. Per the upstream README, download ecs.sh and run bash ecs.sh -m <mode> with optional parameters such as -en, -base, -ctype, -dtype, -stype, -bansp, and -banup. The script checks system, CPU, memory, disk, streaming unlock, TikTok unlock, return route, IP quality, mail ports, and speed tests. It may install dependencies, update the package manager, consume significant resources, generate outbound traffic, and upload full/simple benchmark results to pastebin by default, so it is not recommended for production hosts.

parameters.name: -en
parameters.description: Request English output. English users should pass this option explicitly when running the upstream script.

parameters.name: -mdisk
parameters.description: Enable the upstream multi-disk test option.

parameters.name: args
parameters.description: Additional arguments passed to upstream ecs.sh; check the spiritLHLS/ecs README for the current option list.
